'''Brenu''' was the second celestial body in [[Orbit/Legends|orbit]] around the [[Star/Legends|star]] [[Beheboth (star)|Beheboth]] in the [[Beheboth system/Legends|Beheboth system]],<ref name="Beheboth Part 1" /> which was situated in the [[Sanbra sector/Legends|Sanbra sector]],<ref name="EAOC" /> a part of the [[Trailing Sectors/Legends|Trailing Sectors]] portion of<ref name="EA Outer Rim" /> the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]]. Classified as a sungrazer [[Planetoid/Legends|planetoid]], Brenu did not have any [[Moon/Legends|moons]].<ref name="Beheboth Part 1" />

==Behind the scenes==
Brenu was first mentioned in "Return to Prosperity," the first article in the ''[[Planet Hoppers]]'' series ''[[Beheboth: Blood and Water]]''. The article was published on [[Wizards of the Coast]]'s [[Wizards.com|website]] on [[June 3]], [[2004]], and it was written by [[Cory J. Herndon]].<ref name="Beheboth Part 1" /> The [[2009]] reference book ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' placed the Beheboth system, and therefore Brenu, in grid square O-17.<ref name="TEA" />
